$comment: GCD-SOCIAL canonical brand tokens. Hex values anchored to the real artwork in assets/brand/ (GCD LOGO 2026.svg vector fills + sampled embedded rasters), 2026-06-23. Source of truth for brand-voice, image-brief, and any rendering code.

primary.name: Royal Blue
primary.use: Wordmark, headlines, primary text on light backgrounds, key UI/links.

secondary.name: Lemondrop Yellow
secondary.use: Brand disc, highlights, accents on navy/blue. The signature GCD yellow.

secondaryTint.name: Pale Lemon
secondaryTint.use: Soft backgrounds / fills; the logo disc interior. Not for text.

accent.name: Red
accent.use: Sparing emphasis / alerts only. Never a large fill.

navyOnYellow.note: Signature lockup (the logo). Use for large text/headlines; verify >=3:1 for large, prefer navy #182848 for small text.

yellowOnNavy.note: High contrast; good for headlines and CTAs on dark.

whiteOnNavy.note: Body text on dark; high contrast.

accessibility.note: Yellow #F8E000 is a poor text color on white (fails WCAG). Use navy/royal for text; reserve yellow for fills, large display type, and accents. Always verify the specific fg/bg pair meets WCAG AA (4.5:1 body, 3:1 large).

assets.note: Both SVGs wrap high-res embedded rasters (logo 2540px, POMG 2976px). Treat as raster for scaling; do not upscale beyond native. Request true vector reissue if crisp small-size rendering is needed.
